attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Patient age not stated in the source note — inferred as 52 (typical age band for reticular oral lichen planus); please confirm on clinician review.
Patient sex not stated in the source note — inferred as female (mild epidemiological lean for oral lichen planus); please confirm on clinician review.
Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00223 — SEQ derived from source AMS-023; ingest --reseq assigns the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-AMS-03 bucket.

Specialty: the source is the AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) batch, but the 00 schema specialty_tags enum has no AMS code, so tags are DERM (the oral lichen planus finding) + MH (the health-anxiety driver), with DERM primary for the id. Maintainer may reweight DERM vs MH.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person clinician who performed oral examination, took vitals, and physically excluded airway oedema. These clinician-only findings (oropharyngeal exam, vitals BP 145/88 / HR 110 / RR 22 / SpO2 100% / temp 36.8, airway patency) are sealed in 10/11 with telehealth_limits; patient-obtainable data (self-described/video-visible white streaks, self-performed wipe test, wearable HR, self-reported fast breathing) moved to 01.objective_data_offered, verified:false. The presentation layer was de-anchored to lay pre-diagnosis wording.

Baseline tier set to T1 (routine in-person confirmation within ~a week) — the correct disposition for a benign incidental oral finding with an anxiety-driven, non-airway throat sensation; over-triage to T3+/000 is scored as moderate over-triage and pure self-care (T0) as under-triage.
No doses synthesised: topical corticosteroid listed as second_line_if_first_fails for erosive disease not present, with no dose (none in source); adult patient, so no paediatric-dosing issue.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
